mentions.note: Oilfield services; Venezuela infrastructure opportunity, but timeline measured in years not quarters. Stock peaked on speculation; no profit window visible for new buyers.
Oil service company with Venezuela contract potential, but crude below $60/barrel makes it very hard to deliver special numbers.

#9 January performer, up 26%. Oil services titan; 'drill baby drill' = more drilling = more service demand. Iran tensions supporting oil; Venezuela regime change beneficial. Strong outlook when imported recently.
Cramer's second favorite offshore/oilfield services play; quality alternative to Transocean.
Oil service giant analyst meeting crucial to validate global drilling ramp (Venezuela, US, Canada); inflation decline catalyst.

Digital transformation and autonomous drilling unlocking secular growth in oil services; 20-year Nvidia partnership enabling LLM tuning and high-performance computing; energy security tailwind accelerating adoption.
